subject: Fw: Yoed performing today
body:
no word on other front.. but i thought you might like this photo

----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Joanne Oriti <joanne@mottolaco.com>
To: JEFFREY EPSTEIN <jeeproject@yahoo.com>; THOMAS D. MOTTOLA <hunter5000@mac.com>
Sent: Saturday, April 12, 2008 8:50:27 PM
Subject: Yoed performing today

-am forwarding per Tommy . FYI Yoed was excellent today as it was his first gig at Bowery Wine Co.  Introduced him to someone who is a Classical expert who is putting him in touch with more people for gigs on the local scene in NYC. 
_________________________________
Joanne Oriti
Casablanca Music
_________________________________
